hyperedges.rationale: Autonomous daemon executes plans, ACI planner decomposes goals into objectives, hive_mind dispatches drones — together they form the autonomous loop
Heartbeat drives event polling, unified daemon hosts file watcher + event poll + heartbeat, daemon_control gates approval state machine
MCP server bridges Claude to LazyOwn, LLM bridge implements Groq/Ollama backends, Groq agents wrap tool registry into thread pool
